editionTitle: IB ACIO Daily Current Affairs — 11 July 2026
editionTitle_hi: आईबी एसीआईओ दैनिक करेंट अफेयर्स — 11 जुलाई 2026

articles.title: Ayushman Bharat — World's Largest Health Insurance Scheme
articles.title_hi: आयुष्मान भारत — दुनिया की सबसे बड़ी स्वास्थ्य बीमा योजना
articles.summary: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY provides ₹5 lakh health cover per family per year to over 12 crore beneficiary families.
articles.summary_hi: आयुष्मान भारत PM-JAY 12 करोड़+ परिवारों को प्रति वर्ष ₹5 लाख स्वास्थ्य कवर देता है।
articles.content:
Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY) was launched in September 2018 as the world's largest government-funded health insurance scheme.

It provides coverage of up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalisation to approximately 12 crore poor and vulnerable families identified through SECC data.

The scheme is implemented by the National Health Authority (NHA). It covers pre-existing conditions from day one with no cap on family size or age.

For IB ACIO: launch year (2018), cover amount (₹5 lakh), and implementing agency (NHA) are frequently asked.
articles.content_hi:
आयुष्मान भारत PM-JAY सितंबर 2018 में दुनिया की सबसे बड़ी सरकारी स्वास्थ्य बीमा योजना के रूप में शुरू हुआ।

12 करोड़+ परिवारों को प्रति वर्ष ₹5 लाख का कवर मिलता है। NHA इसे लागू करता है।

IB ACIO: 2018, ₹5 लाख, NHA — याद रखें।
articles.question: What is the annual health coverage limit per family under Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY?
articles.question_hi: आयुष्मान भारत PM-JAY में प्रति परिवार वार्षिक कवर सीमा क्या है?
articles.explanation: PM-JAY provides health coverage of up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for hospitalisation.
articles.explanation_hi: PM-JAY प्रति परिवार प्रति वर्ष ₹5 लाख तक अस्पताल में भर्ती के लिए कवर देता है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: PM-JAY + Health & Wellness Centres (HWCs) under Ayushman Bharat. HWCs aim for universal primary healthcare.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: आयुष्मान भारत के Health & Wellness Centres (HWCs)।

articles.title: NATO — Purpose, Members, and India’s Non-Membership
articles.title_hi: NATO — उद्देश्य, सदस्य और भारत की गैर-सदस्यता
articles.summary: NATO is a military alliance of 32 member countries founded in 1949 — important for international relations GK.
articles.summary_hi: NATO 1949 में स्थापित 32 सदस्य देशों का सैन्य गठबंधन — अंतर्राष्ट्रीय संबंध GK के लिए महत्वपूर्ण।
articles.content:
The North Atlantic Treaty Organization (NATO) was established on 4 April 1949 under the Washington Treaty as a collective defence alliance.

Its core principle is Article 5: an attack on one member is considered an attack on all. NATO currently has 32 members, including the USA, UK, France, Germany, and newer members from Eastern Europe.

India is not a NATO member but engages with NATO on issues like counter-terrorism and maritime security. NATO headquarters is in Brussels, Belgium.

For IB ACIO: founding year (1949), Article 5, HQ (Brussels), and India’s status (non-member) are key facts.
articles.content_hi:
NATO 4 अप्रैल 1949 को Washington संधि के तहत स्थापित सामूहिक रक्षा गठबंधन है।

Article 5: एक पर हमला सभी पर हमला। 32 सदस्य। मुख्यालय ब्रussels, बेल्जियम। भारत सदस्य नहीं।

IB ACIO: 1949, Article 5, Brussels — याद रखें।
articles.question: Where is the headquarters of NATO located?
articles.explanation: NATO headquarters is located in Brussels, Belgium.
articles.explanation_hi: NATO का मुख्यालय ब्रussels, बेल्जियम में है।
articles.moreInfo: NATO expanded after Cold War. Finland joined in 2023, Sweden in 2024. Distinguish from UN, EU, and BRICS.
articles.moreInfo_hi: फिनलैंड 2023, स्वीडन 2024 में शामिल। UN, EU, BRICS से अलग रखें।

articles.title: SEBI — Regulator of Indian Securities Market
articles.title_hi: SEBI — भारतीय प्रतिभूति बाजार का नियामक
articles.summary: SEBI regulates stock exchanges, mutual funds, and protects investor interests in India’s capital markets.
articles.summary_hi: SEBI स्टॉक एक्सचेंज, म्यूचुअल फंड नियंत्रित करता है और निवेशकों की रक्षा करता है।
articles.content:
The Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) was established in 1988 and given statutory powers through the SEBI Act, 1992.

SEBI regulates the securities market, stock exchanges (BSE, NSE), mutual funds, portfolio managers, and insider trading. Its mandate is to protect investor interests and promote fair market development.

SEBI is headquartered in Mumbai. The chairman is appointed by the Government of India.

For IB ACIO: SEBI Act (1992), HQ (Mumbai), and role as capital market regulator are must-know.
articles.content_hi:
SEBI 1988 में स्थापित, SEBI अधिनियम 1992 से वैधानिक शक्तियाँ। BSE, NSE, म्यूचुअल फंड नियंत्रित करता है।

मुख्यालय मुंबई। IB ACIO: 1992, Mumbai — याद रखें।
articles.question: SEBI was given statutory powers under which Act?
articles.question_hi: SEBI को किस अधिनियम के तहत वैधानिक शक्तियाँ मिलीं?
articles.explanation: SEBI received statutory authority through the SEBI Act, 1992.
articles.explanation_hi: SEBI को SEBI अधिनियम, 1992 के माध्यम से वैधानिक अधिकार मिला।
articles.moreInfo: RBI regulates banking. IRDAI regulates insurance. SEBI regulates securities — know the trio for exams.
articles.moreInfo_hi: RBI बैंकिंग, IRDAI बीमा, SEBI प्रतिभूति — तीनों याद रखें।

articles.title: Operation Sindoor — India's Precision Strike on Terror Infrastructure
articles.title_hi: ऑपरेशन सिंदूर — आतंकी ढांचे पर भारत की सटीक कार्रवाई
articles.summary: Operation Sindoor (May 2025) was India's military response targeting terrorist camps in Pakistan and PoK after the Pahalgam attack.
articles.summary_hi: ऑपरेशन सिंदूर (मई 2025) पहलगाम हमले के बाद PAK और PoK में आतंकी शिविरों पर भारत की सैन्य कार्रवाई थी।
articles.content:
Operation Sindoor was launched by India in May 2025 as a precision military operation against terrorist infrastructure in Pakistan and Pakistan-occupied Kashmir.

It followed the Pahalgam terror attack in Jammu & Kashmir in April 2025 that killed 26 civilians. India used precision munitions targeting nine terrorist camps while avoiding escalation to full-scale war.

The operation demonstrated India's doctrine of punitive retaliation against cross-border terrorism. It lasted several days before a ceasefire was agreed.

For IB ACIO: operation name, context (Pahalgam attack), and precision strike approach are high-priority current affairs.
articles.content_hi:
ऑपरेशन सिंदूर मई 2025 में PAK और PoK में आतंकी ढांचे पर भारत की सटीक सैन्य कार्रवाई थी।

अप्रैल 2025 पहलगाम हमले (26 नागरिक) के बाद शुरू। नौ आतंकी शिविरों पर हमला।

IB ACIO: नाम, पहलगाम संदर्भ — महत्वपूर्ण CA।
articles.question: Operation Sindoor was launched by India in response to which terror attack?
articles.question_hi: ऑपरेशन सिंदूर किस आतंकी हमले के जवाब में शुरू किया गया?
articles.explanation: Operation Sindoor was India's response to the Pahalgam terror attack in April 2025.
articles.explanation_hi: ऑपरेशन सिंदूर अप्रैल 2025 पहलगाम आतंकी हमले के जवाब में था।
articles.moreInfo: Compare: Surgical Strikes (2016, Uri), Balakot (2019, Pulwama). Operation Sindoor (2025, Pahalgam).
articles.moreInfo_hi: तुलना: Surgical Strikes 2016, Balakot 2019, Operation Sindoor 2025।

articles.title: UPI — India's Real-Time Digital Payments Revolution
articles.title_hi: UPI — भारत की रियल-टाइम डिजिटल भुगतान क्रांति
articles.summary: Unified Payments Interface (UPI) enables instant bank-to-bank transfers via mobile — developed by NPCI.
articles.summary_hi: UPI NPCI द्वारा विकसित तत्काल बैंक-से-बैंक मोबाइल भुगतान प्रणाली है।
articles.content:
Unified Payments Interface (UPI) was launched by NPCI (National Payments Corporation of India) in 2016.

It allows instant 24/7 fund transfers between bank accounts using a Virtual Payment Address (VPA) or QR codes. UPI has made India the world leader in real-time digital payments by volume.

Key apps using UPI include PhonePe, Google Pay, Paytm, and BHIM. UPI has also been extended internationally to countries like UAE, France, and Singapore.

For IB ACIO: developer (NPCI), launch (2016), and NPCI as umbrella organisation for retail payments are exam essentials.
articles.content_hi:
UPI 2016 में NPCI द्वारा लॉन्च। 24/7 तत्काल बैंक ट्रांसफर, VPA/QR से।

PhonePe, GPay, BHIM UPI उपयोग करते हैं। IB ACIO: NPCI, 2016 — याद रखें।
articles.question: UPI was developed by which organisation?
articles.question_hi: UPI किस संगठन द्वारा विकसित किया गया?
articles.explanation: UPI was developed and is operated by NPCI (National Payments Corporation of India).
articles.explanation_hi: UPI NPCI (नेशनल पेमेंट्स कॉर्पोरेशन ऑफ इंडिया) द्वारा विकसित और संचालित है।
articles.moreInfo: NPCI also runs IMPS, RuPay, NACH. RBI regulates payment systems; NPCI operates them.
articles.moreInfo_hi: NPCI IMPS, RuPay भी चलाता है। RBI नियंत्रित करता है, NPCI संचालित।

articles.title: Jal Jeevan Mission — Har Ghar Jal by 2024
articles.title_hi: जल जीवन मिशन — 2024 तक हर घर जल
articles.summary: Jal Jeevan Mission aims to provide functional household tap connections to every rural household in India.
articles.summary_hi: जल जीवन मिशन का लक्ष्य हर ग्रामीण घर में कार्यात्मक नल कनेक्शन देना है।
articles.content:
Jal Jeevan Mission (JJM) was launched in 2019 with the goal of providing Functional Household Tap Connections (FHTC) to every rural household by 2024.

It is implemented by the Department of Drinking Water and Sanitation, Ministry of Jal Shakti. The mission focuses on community participation, source sustainability, and greywater management.

As of recent updates, over 15 crore rural households have received tap water connections under the mission, significantly improving rural water access.

For IB ACIO: launch (2019), ministry (Jal Shakti), and FHTC target are frequently tested.
articles.content_hi:
जल जीवन मिशन 2019 में शुरू — हर ग्रामीण घर में FHTC। जल शक्ति मंत्रालय लागू करता है।

15 करोड़+ घरों को नल कनेक्शन। IB ACIO: 2019, Jal Shakti — याद रखें।
articles.question: Jal Jeevan Mission is implemented by which ministry?
articles.question_hi: जल जीवन मिशन किस मंत्रालय द्वारा लागू किया जाता है?
articles.explanation: Jal Jeevan Mission is implemented by the Ministry of Jal Shakti through the Department of Drinking Water and Sanitation.
articles.explanation_hi: जल जीवन मिशन जल शक्ति मंत्रालय द्वारा लागू किया जाता है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Swachh Bharat Mission (sanitation). JJM complements SBM for holistic rural development.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: स्वच्छ भारत मिशन। JJM SBM के पूरक।

articles.title: Fundamental Rights — Part III of the Indian Constitution
articles.title_hi: मौलिक अधिकार — भारतीय संविधान भाग III
articles.summary: Part III (Articles 12-35) guarantees six fundamental rights to citizens — cornerstone of Indian democracy.
articles.summary_hi: भाग III (धारा 12-35) नागरिकों को छह मौलिक अधिकार देता है — भारतीय लोकतंत्र का आधार।
articles.content:
The Fundamental Rights are enshrined in Part III of the Constitution (Articles 12 to 35) and are justiciable — enforceable through courts.

The six categories are: Right to Equality (14-18), Right to Freedom (19-22), Right against Exploitation (23-24), Right to Freedom of Religion (25-28), Cultural and Educational Rights (29-30), and Right to Constitutional Remedies (32).

Article 32, called the 'heart and soul' of the Constitution by Dr Ambedkar, allows citizens to approach the Supreme Court directly for enforcement of Fundamental Rights.

For IB ACIO: six rights, Article 32 significance, and justiciability are polity staples.
articles.content_hi:
मौलिक अधिकार भाग III (धारा 12-35) में, न्यायालय द्वारा लागू।

छह श्रेणियाँ: समानता, स्वतंत्रता, शोषण से मुक्ति, धर्म, सांस्कृतिक/शैक्षिक, संवैधानिक उपचार (32)।

धारा 32 — डॉ. अंबेडकर ने 'संविधान की आत्मा' कहा।
articles.question: Which Article is known as the 'Right to Constitutional Remedies'?
articles.question_hi: कौन सी धारा 'संवैधानिक उपचार का अधिकार' कहलाती है?
articles.explanation: Article 32 provides the right to move the Supreme Court for enforcement of Fundamental Rights.
articles.explanation_hi: धारा 32 मौलिक अधिकारों के प्रवर्तन के लिए SC जाने का अधिकार देती है।
articles.moreInfo: Article 226: High Courts can also enforce FRs. DPSP (Part IV) are non-justiciable — contrast for exams.
articles.moreInfo_hi: धारा 226: HC भी FR लागू कर सकते हैं। DPSP (भाग IV) गैर-न्यायिक।

articles.title: Bharat Ratna — India's Highest Civilian Honour
articles.title_hi: भारत रत्न — भारत का सर्वोच्च नागरिक सम्मान
articles.summary: Bharat Ratna is awarded for exceptional service in art, literature, science, and public service since 1954.
articles.summary_hi: भारत रत्न 1954 से कला, साहित्य, विज्ञान और सार्वजनिक सेवा में उत्कृष्ट योगदान के लिए दिया जाता है।
articles.content:
The Bharat Ratna is India's highest civilian award, instituted in 1954. It is awarded without distinction of race, occupation, position, or sex.

Recipients include Dr B.R. Ambedkar, Sardar Patel, Mother Teresa, Nelson Mandela (honorary), Sachin Tendulkar, Lata Mangeshkar, and APJ Abdul Kalam.

The award was suspended during 1977-1980 and the criteria were broadened in 2011 to include 'any field of human endeavour'.

For IB ACIO: instituted (1954), highest civilian award, and recent recipients are common GK questions.
articles.content_hi:
भारत रत्न 1954 में स्थापित भारत का सर्वोच्च नागरिक पुरस्कार।

प्राप्तकर्ता: अंबेडकर, पटेल, मदर टेरेसा, सचिन, लता, कलाम।

2011 में मानदंड विस्तारित। IB ACIO: 1954, सर्वोच्च नागरिक — याद रखें।
articles.question: In which year was the Bharat Ratna award instituted?
articles.question_hi: भारत रत्न पुरस्कार किस वर्ष स्थापित किया गया?
articles.explanation: The Bharat Ratna was instituted on 2 January 1954.
articles.explanation_hi: भारत रत्न 2 जनवरी 1954 को स्थापित किया गया।
articles.moreInfo: Padma Vibhushan > Padma Bhushan > Padma Shri. Bharat Ratna is above all Padma awards.
articles.moreInfo_hi: पद्म विभूषण > पद्म भूषण > पद्म श्री। भारत रत्न सबसे ऊपर।
